title: Vance Taylor
compiled_truth: Vance Taylor is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-16 to 2001-06-11), Vance Taylor sent 21 and received 373 emails, totalling 394 interactions. Top correspondents: [Daren Farmer](people/daren-farmer) (21), [Melissa Graves](people/melissa-graves) (17), [Susan Smith](people/susan-smith) (12), [Donald Reinhardt](people/donald-reinhardt) (10), [Robert Cotten](people/robert-cotten) (8).
